description: Bakshi meets with Dr. List as Coulson's team watches through Mike's cybernetic eye feed. Bakshi claims to have escaped government custody with 'Agent Peterson's' help, and unexpectedly offers Mike to HYDRA. Believing they've been betrayed, Coulson pulls a gun on Ward while Fitz becomes a hostage of Agent 33. Ultimately, Ward convinces Coulson the only way to get to Strucker is to follow Bakshi's off-script plan.

transcript.line: They've been gone a while. I regret letting her go, but at least Lincoln's there to protect her.
